milestoneChecks.title: Promoted repository gate is green at current HEAD

commands.observed: Full test gate failed: 509 passed, 1 failed. Failing test remains tests/app.test.ts > preserves seeded bootstrap runtime semantics after listener-bound transition for a live local host override on port 3000; expected diagnostics source_class stale_live but current HEAD reports fresh_live.
Passed with pre-existing warnings only; no lint errors.

observations: Current HEAD still does not satisfy the promoted regression gate because the required full_test command is red.
Validation API on :3102 was initially down and had to be restarted before fresh validation could proceed.
After restart, :3102 health and diagnostics were healthy for validation-mode seeded bootstrap.

milestoneChecks.title: Endpoint smoke harness is runnable against mission API

commands.observed: Harness ran and produced results, but failed 91 checks / passed 17 / skipped 1. Broad route families returned HTTP 500 internal_server_error while /ping and several invalid-parameter checks passed.
Not rerun after broad harness failure because broad smoke already demonstrated /simple/price failures with HTTP 500.
Not rerun after broad harness failure because broad smoke already demonstrated /coins routes failures with HTTP 500.

observations: Smoke harness is executable in the mission environment, so the repo validation surface is runnable.

Mission API on :3001 still returns generic 500 envelopes for many live routes including /simple/price, /search, /global, /coins/list, /coins/bitcoin, onchain families, treasury families, asset platforms, and diagnostics helper routes.

milestoneChecks.title: Environment is usable for repo gate validation

commands.observed: Only pre-existing untracked files are present (.codex and docs/plans/*.md).
After restart, HTTP 200 with canonical ping payload.
Mission API readiness reports ready while functional endpoints still fail with 500s.
Validation API reports starting/seeded_bootstrap runtime diagnostics after restart.

observations: Both assigned APIs were reachable for this rerun after restarting only the missing validation service.
The environment is usable for validation work, but current HEAD still fails the promoted gate and live smoke surface.
Per milestone instructions, no prior synthesis verdict was reused; validation was rerun live from current HEAD.
This rerun reconfirmed that regression-gate-restoration is not actually restored on the live user surface despite build/typecheck/lint succeeding.
The two current blockers are the single remaining full-suite app-test failure and widespread live 3001 HTTP 500 smoke failures.

frictions.description: The validation API on :3102 was not running at validator start.
frictions.resolution: Restarted the validation service from the manifest start command, then verified /ping and /diagnostics/runtime before proceeding.

frictions.description: scripts/test-endpoints.sh output is large and terminal-truncated.
frictions.resolution: Used the visible script output plus explicit high-level failure summaries from the run to record representative evidence.

blockers.description: Current HEAD full test gate is still red due to one failing Vitest assertion in tests/app.test.ts involving listener-bound seeded bootstrap runtime semantics on port 3000.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validation-only assignment; no code changes made.

blockers.description: Mission API on port 3001 still returns widespread HTTP 500 responses across broad smoke-tested route families, so the live endpoint smoke surface is not healthy.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Confirmed /ping and /diagnostics/runtime, then reran the broad smoke harness against current HEAD without mutating application state.

summary: Fresh validation from current HEAD still fails for the regression-gate-restoration milestone: full_test remains red with one app-test failure, while the live mission API on :3001 produces broad HTTP 500 failures across the smoke harness even though build, typecheck, and lint pass.
